metadata.description: LLM skills for AI coding agents

plugins.name: github-issues-workflow
plugins.description: Issue-driven development workflow for monorepo projects with GitHub issue templates, PR templates, labels, and Claude Code commands

plugins.name: slack-message
plugins.description: Write Slack messages — plain text with Slack markup, direct and concise, copy-paste ready

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Generate a project-specific clean code review command. Auto-detects tech stacks and produces a /{PREFIX}-code-review command tailored to the repo's modules, architecture, and languages

plugins.name: claude-settings
plugins.description: Configure Claude Code project settings for autonomous, unattended work. Sets up .claude/settings.json and .claude/settings.local.json with permissions, hooks, env vars, and plugins tailored to the project's tech stack
